request: Break down our products by their category.
search_document:
User Request: Break down our products by their category.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products by Category
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of products across different categories
Title: Category Details
Type: table
Description: List of categories with product counts and descriptions
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of products available

sample_data.Description: Soft drinks, coffees, teas, beers, and ales
Sweet and savory sauces, relishes, spreads, and seasonings

sql_queries.title: Products by Category
sql_queries.description: Distribution of products across different categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Categories c LEFT JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Category Details
sql_queries.description: List of categories with product counts and descriptions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, c.Description, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Categories c LEFT JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryID, c.CategoryName, c.Description

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
